title: Census of Population and Dwellings data package | Stats NZ
content:
## Census of Population and Dwellings data package
23 January 2015, 10:45am
Download the Census of Population and Dwellings data package. It comprises 14 modules of data drawn from the 2013 and 2006 Censuses. Modules 2, 3, and 6 contain a time series with data from 2001.
The package enables university users to undertake detailed examination of the social, demographic, and economic elements of New Zealand's population.
Birthplace Ethnic group Industry Iwi Language spoken Occupation Post qualification field of study Religious affiliation Relationship to reference person Cigarette smoking status Number of children born Households Families Household income, tenure, and rent (Auckland region)

## Birthplace (module 1)
The following tables contain data by birthplace, 5-year age groups, and urban/rural area.
- Ethnic group and sex
- Language spoken and sex
- Māori descent and sex
- Religious affiliation and sex
2013 Birthplace – All population (Excel zipped, 7.66 MB)
2006 Birthplace – All population (Excel zipped, 3.78 MB)

### Population aged 15 years and over
- Highest qualification and sex
- Sources of personal income (total responses) and sex
- Total personal income and sex
- Social marital status and sex
- Tenure holder and sex
- Unpaid activities and sex
- Work and labour force status and sex
2013 Birthplace – Population over 15 years (Excel zipped, 10.37 MB)
2006 Birthplace – Population over 15 years (Excel zipped, 4.40 MB)

### Employed population aged 15 years and over
- Status in employment and sex
- Industry (ANZSIC06 v1.0) and sex
- Occupation (ANZSCO v1.0) and sex
2013 Birthplace – Employed population (Excel zipped, 3.08 MB)
2006 Birthplace – Employed population (Excel zipped, 1.21 MB)

## Ethnic group (module 2)
Table 2.01 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, birthplace and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 2.65 MB) Table 2.01a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, birthplace and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 989 KB) Table 2.02 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, languages spoken and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 8.16 MB) Table 2.02a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, languages spoken and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 1.73 MB) Table 2.03 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, Māori descent and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 1.47 MB) Table 2.04 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, religious affiliation and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 9.04 MB)

### Population aged 15 years and over
Table 2.05 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, status in employment and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 1.08 MB) Table 2.05a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, status in employment and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 414 KB) Table 2.06 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, industry (ANZSIC06 V1.0) and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 5.58 MB) Table 2.06a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, industry(ANZSIC96) and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 1.10 MB) Table 2.07 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, occupation (ANZSCO V1.0 major group) and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 1.68 MB) Table 2.07a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, occupation(NZSCO99) and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 1.01 MB) Table 2.08 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, highest qualification and sex - 2006 Census (Excel, 5.35 MB) Table 2.08a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, highest qualification and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 1.03 MB) Table 2.09 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, legal marital status and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 1.64 MB) Table 2.10 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, sources of personal income and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 5.72 MB) Table 2.10a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, sources of personal income and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 1.24 MB) Table 2.11 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, total personal income and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 5.69 MB) Table 2.11a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, total personal income and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 1.17 MB) Table 2.12 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, social marital status and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 2.63 MB) Table 2.12a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, social marital status and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 987 KB)

### Employed population aged 15 years and over
Table 2.13 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, tenure holder and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 1.04 MB) Table 2.13a By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban-rural area, tenure holder and sex – 2001 Census (Excel, 396 KB) Table 2.14 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, unpaid activities and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 2.03 MB) Table 2.15 By ethnic group and age group (5-year groups), urban/rural area, status in employment and sex – 2006 Census (Excel, 1.64 MB)
The following tables contain data on industry for the employed census usually resident population count aged 15 years and over. The data is available in 5-year age groups, by sex, and by urban/rural area.
The tables contain data from the 2013 Census. Data from the 2006 Census are also available for some tables, using the 2013 Census geographic area files.
2013 Census Industry (Excel zipped, 19.89 MB)
2006 Census Industry (Excel zipped, 9.84 MB)
- Birthplace (includes 2006 data)
- Language spoken (includes 2006 data)
- Religious affiliation
- Highest qualification (includes 2006 data)
- Tenure holder (includes 2006 data)
2013 Census Industry marital status (Excel zipped, 4.30 MB)
2006 Census Industry marital (Excel zipped, 2.73 MB)
- Legal marital status
- Social marital status (includes 2006 data)
2013 Census Industry work (Excel zipped, 3.59 MB)
2006 Census Industry work (Excel zipped, 3.70 MB)
- Status in employment (includes 2006 data)
- Occupation (includes 2006 data)

### Income and unpaid activities
2013 Census Industry income (Excel zipped, 10.80 MB)
2006 Census Industry income (Excel zipped, 7.28 MB)
- Personal income sources (includes 2006 data)
- Total personal income (includes 2006 data)
- Work status (includes 2006 data)
The following tables containing data on iwi in 5-year age groups, by urban/rural area, and by sex.
2013 Census iwi (Excel zipped, 5.86 MB)
2006 Census iwi (Excel zipped, 4.07 MB)
- Religious affiliation
- Ethnic group (Level 1)

### Population aged 15 years and over
2013 Census iwi 15 years and over (Excel zipped, 7.89 MB)
2006 Census iwi 15 years and over (Excel zipped, 4.80 MB)
- Highest qualification
- Legal and social marital status
- Sources of personal income
- Total personal income
- Work and labour force status

### Employed population aged 15 years and over
2013 Census iwi employed (Excel zipped, 2.28 MB)
2006 Census iwi employed (Excel zipped, 1.56 MB)
- Status in employment

The following tables all contain data by language spoken, 5-year age groups, and urban/rural area.
2013 Language spoken – all population (Excel zipped, 0.64 MB)
2006 Language spoken – all population (Excel zipped, 0.39 MB)
- Māori descent and sex
- Religious affiliation and sex

### Population aged 15 years and over
2013 Language spoken – population 15 years and over (Excel zipped, 0.97 MB)
2006 Language spoken – population 15 years and over (Excel zipped, 1.43 MB)
- Highest qualification and sex
- Legal marital status and sex
- Sources of total personal income and sex
- Total personal income and sex
- Social marital status and sex
- Tenure holder and sex
- Unpaid activities and sex
- Work and labour force status, and sex
- Ethnic group and sex

### Employed population aged 15 years and over
2013 Language spoken – employed population 15 years and over (Excel zipped, 0.29 MB)
2006 Language spoken – employed population 15 years and over (Excel zipped, 0.95 MB)
- Status in employment and sex
- Industry division (ANZSIC06 v1.0) and sex
- Occupation (ANZSCO v1.0 major group) and sex

## Occupation (module 6)
The following tables contain data on occupation for the employed census usually resident population, aged 15 years and over. The data is available by 5-year age groups, by sex, and by urban/rural area.
The tables contain data from the 2013, 2006, and (where available) 2001 Censuses.
2013 Census occupation (Excel zipped, 19.62 MB)
2006 and 2001 Census occupation (Excel zipped, 20.98 MB)
- Highest qualification
- Māori descent (2013 and 2006 data only)
- Ethnic group (level 1 grouped total responses – 2013 and 2006 data only)
- Religious affiliation and sex (2013 and 2006 data only)

### Income and unpaid activities
2013 Census occupation income (Excel zipped, 7.58 MB)
2006 and 2001 Census occupation income (Excel zipped, 10.50 MB)
- Sources of personal income
- Total personal income
- Unpaid activities (2013 and 2006 data only)
2013 Census occupation work (Excel zipped, 4.36 MB)
2006 and 2001 Census occupation work (Excel zipped, 7.45 MB)
- Status in employment
- Total personal income
- Unpaid activities (2013 and 2006 data only)
2013 Census occupation marital (Excel zipped, 3.04 MB)
2006-01 Census occupation marital (Excel zipped, 5.27 MB)
- Legal marital status (2013 and 2006 data only)
- Social marital status

## Post qualification field of study (module 7)
The following tables all contain data by post qualification field of study, by 5-year age group, by urban/rural area, and by sex.

### Population aged 15 years and over
2013 Field of study (Excel zipped, 24.55 MB)
2006 Field of study (Excel zipped, 1.31 MB)
- Ethnic group (level 1)
- Religious affiliation
- Highest qualification
- Partnership and marital status

### Work, unpaid activities and income
2013 Field of study, work and income (Excel zipped, 12.99 MB)
2006 Field of study, work and income (Excel zipped, 0.66 MB)
- Sources of personal income
- Total personal income
- Work and labour force status

### Employed population aged 15 years and over
2013 Field of study employed (Excel zipped, 8.67 MB)
2006 Field of study employed (Excel zipped, 0.38 MB)
- Status in employment
- Industry division (ANZSIC06 v1.0)
- Occupation (ANZSCO v1.0 major group)

2013 Religious affiliation for all population (Excel zipped, 2.57 MB)

## Cigarette smoking status (module 10)
The following tables contain data on cigarette smoking status, by age group, district health board region, and sex.
2013 Census smoking (Excel zipped, 4.45 MB)
2006 Census smoking (Excel zipped, 1.59 MB)
- Highest qualification
- Individual's role in the family nucleus
- Social marital status

### Birthplace and ethnic group
2013 Census smoking birthplace (Excel zipped, 27.05 MB)
2006 Census smoking birthplace (CSV and Excel zipped, 6.03 MB)
- Birthplace and ethnic group (level 1 total response)
- Birthplace and ethnic group (combination)
- Iwi affiliation (total response)
2013 Census smoking work (Excel zipped, 19.73 MB)
2006 Census smoking work (CSV and Excel zipped, 6.78 MB)
- Work and labour force status
- Status in employment

## Number of children born (module 11)
2006 Census metadata for number of children born module 11 CSV tables 4, 9, and 10 (Excel, 95.0 KB)
Table 11.1 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born, and birthplace by ethnic group (level 1 total response) and age group (Excel, 16.4 MB) Table 11.2 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born, and industry (ANZSIC06) by ethnic group (level 1 total response) and age group (Excel, 20.1 MB) Table 11.3 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born, and occupation (ANZSCO) by ethnic group (level 1 total response) and age group (Excel, 9.37 MB) Table 11.4 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born, and iwi affiliation (total response) by age group (5 year groups) (CSV, 18.3 MB) Table 11.5 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born, and highest qualification by ethnic group (level 1 total response) and age group (Excel, 3.0 MB) Table 11.6 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born, and work and labour force status by ethnic group (total response) and age group (Excel, 1.56 MB) Table 11.7 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born, and total personal income by ethnic group (level 1 total response) and age group (Excel, 3.28 MB) Table 11.8 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born and sources of personal income (total response) by ethnic group and age (Excel, 3.47 MB) Table 11.9 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born, and birthplace (broad groups) by ethnic group (single combination) and age group (CSV, 9.44 MB) Table 11.10 By area of usual residence incl DHB, number of children born, and social marital status by ethnic group (single combination) and age group (CSV, 9.61 MB)

## Households (module 12)
The following tables contain data on household composition by child dependency in private dwellings, and by area (including district health board regions).
2013 Household composition (Excel zipped, 15.94 MB)
2006 Household composition (Excel zipped, 8.01 MB)
- Total household income
- Sources of household income
- Access to telecommunication
- Household tenure and by sources of household income
- Fuel types to heat dwelling, and by sources of household income
2013 Household tenure (Excel zipped, 7.02 MB)
2006 Household tenure (Excel zipped, 5.24 MB)
- Grouped total household income and by sources of household income
- Number of usual residents in household
- Fuel types to heat dwelling
2013 Household weekly rent (Excel zipped, 5.14 MB)
2006 Household weekly rent (Excel zipped, 3.90 MB)
- Sources of household income
- Total household income

## Families (module 13)
Table 13.1 By area incl DHB sex of sole parent and total family income by age of youngest dependent child in family (Excel, 1.23 MB) Table 13.2 By area incl DHB sex of sole parent and total family income by number of dependent children in family (Excel, 1.13 MB) Table 13.3 By area incl DHB sex of sole parent and grouped total family income by sources of family income and age of youngest dependent child in family (Excel, 2.15 MB) Table 13.4 By area incl DHB sex of sole parent and sources of family income by grouped total family income and number of dependent children in family (Excel, 9.21 MB) Table 13.5 By area incl DHB family type by child dependency status and grouped total family income by sources of family income (Excel, 2.73 MB) Table 13.6 By area incl DHB age of youngest dependent child in family and number of dependent children in family by family type with type of couple (Excel, 4.29 MB) Table 13.7 By area incl DHB family type with type of couple and total family income by sources of family income (Excel, 2.73 MB) Table 13.8 By area incl DHB total family income and number of dependent children in family by family type by child dependency status (Excel, 6.81 MB) Table 13.9 By area incl DHB extended family type by grouped extended family income and sources of extended family income (Excel, 527 KB) Table 13.10 By area incl DHB family type by child dependency status by age of youngest child in family (Excel, 1.06 MB)

## Household income, tenure, and rent, Auckland region (module 14)
The following tables contain data on households for the Auckland region.
Technical notes for Auckland local boards (Excel, 38 KB)
2013 Household data (Excel zipped, 32 KB)
2006 Household data (Excel zipped, 21 KB)
- Total household income includes median and mean
- Tenure of households
- Household mean and median weekly rent paid
- Statistics for university staff and students 13 January 2021
